title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
